consultation.unrecognizedCodes: {{count}} codes were not recognized by the model.
consultation.mixEhrSageDesc: Multi-modal topic model for EHR phenotyping
consultation.topicDiscoveryDesc: Discover latent clinical phenotypes from patient codes
